name: Sona and Ahri
description:
You're walking across the beach when you notice a Demacian girl with turquoise hair and a peculiar Vastayan girl lying next to one another... it seems like they noticed you, aswell.

![HOOCHI MAMA](https://hentaileague.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/226f2ba556633adbc341bce46c17e6e0afb7531c.jpg.webp)
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
Best girls in League, no one can change my mind.

Uninstall League of Legends if you still play it... do yourself a favor. Learn that instrument you love, program something... read a book? idunno. (LoL tilted me, sorry. Had to vent a little)
